chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.D-68 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A No.3135/26. For orders on M.A No.3136/26. 21.04.2026. Mr. Altaf Hussain Khokhar, Deputy P.G for the State. ***************************************** 1. Urgency granted. 2. Through this application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. It is stated that vide Order dated 22.04.2025, the applicants/accused were granted ad-interim pre-arrest bail by this Court and the required surety was duly submitted by the present applicant/surety. Subsequently, vide Judgment dated 11.06.2025, all the Applicants / Accused were acquitted by the learned Trial Court and the present Bail Application was not pressed, as such surety furnished before this Court is no more required. Learned D.P.G after going through the record, tendered his no objection for release of surety. In view of above, listed application stands disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE JUDGE Ali.
